LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MATTER WAS ARGUED. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS WITH MODIFICATION: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS TESTIMONY AND THE AY DECLARATION, OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED. GRANTING AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 WAS WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

STEVEN PATTI, ESQ.(CLAPPER, PATTI, SCHWEIZER & MASON), (415)332-4262, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, FLOYD LANGERMAN, ET. AL.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS WITH MODIFICATION: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS TESTIMONY AND THE AY DECLARATION, OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED. GRANTING AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 WAS WITHDRAWN. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
